calendar.matters:
MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Mark V. Isola, Esq. of BrothersSmith LLP, T:925.944.9700, for petitioners;
Steven D. Meacham, Esq. of Peel Brimley LLP, T:702.990.7272, for respondents.

RULING: The Court allows respondent to argue the tentative ruling despite the untimely notice to contest. The matter was argued. At the conclusion of argument, the Court adopted the tentative ruling on PETITIONER GOLDEN GATE COMPANY, INC.'s MOTION TO COMPEL ARBITRATION, as follows:

Petitioner Golden Gate Sign Company, Inc.'s petition to compel arbitration is granted.

(See word minutes for the Court's complete ruling.)

Order and Judgment were signed in open court.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Maria A. Torreano CSR#8600, email: maria.torreano@gmail.com

Petitioner Golden Gate Company, Inc. Motion To Compel Arbitration (For Tentative Ruling Only)
Off Calendar Oct-08-2019 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:
Petitioner Golden Gate Company, Inc. Motion To Compel Arbitration (For Tentative Ruling Only) is a duplicate entry. (302)
